# Apache Doris Documentation

Curated entry points for LLM-based discovery and retrieval. Prefer these stable pages instead of crawling every generated page at once.

- Overview: https://doris.apache.org/docs/4.x/gettingStarted/what-is-apache-doris
- Getting Started: https://doris.apache.org/docs/4.x/gettingStarted/quick-start
- SQL Manual: https://doris.apache.org/docs/4.x/sql-manual/basic-element/object-identifiers
- Load: https://doris.apache.org/docs/4.x/data-operate/import/load-manual
- Lakehouse: https://doris.apache.org/docs/4.x/lakehouse/lakehouse-overview
- AI: https://doris.apache.org/docs/4.x/ai/ai-overview
- Admin: https://doris.apache.org/docs/4.x/admin-manual/data-admin/overview
- Release Notes: https://doris.apache.org/releases/all-release
- Community: https://doris.apache.org/community/join-community

Full-site retrieval should use topic-scoped indexes or the sitemap rather than a single oversized prompt file.
